silhouette: Compact forward-leaning striker with a narrow torso, long lower legs and a lightning-bolt antenna.
bodyParts: single angular head integrated into the torso
two compact forearms with one striking gauntlet
weapon: Integrated short-range electric striking gauntlet on the leading arm.
identityConstraints: always keep exactly two arms and two legs
the striking gauntlet stays on the leading arm
the rear power cell keeps the same size and position
use the accent color resolved from game-balance.json
negativeConstraints: electric glow merged into the body silhouette
notes: MVP identity reference for the starting STRIKER and its fixed follow-up reaction.
